symbols.name: Limit operator
symbols.meaning: Describes the value a function approaches.

topics.title: Derivative Workflow Template
topics.summary: Template entry showing how a concept page is structured.
topics.narrative: Use this section for the plain-language teaching narrative. Explain what a derivative means, when to use it, and why the rule works.

steps.title: Identify rule
steps.explanation: Use the power rule because the function is x raised to a power.

steps.title: Apply rule
steps.explanation: Bring exponent down and subtract one from exponent.
